headline: Travelers Reports Excellent Second Quarter and Year-to-Date Results
summary: NEW YORK, July 17, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. today reported net income of $2.208 billion, or $10.26 per diluted share, for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, compared to $1.509 billion, or $6.53 per diluted share, in the prior year quarter. headline: Travelers Earnings Beat Estimates. Does It Prove Recent Downgrades Wrong?
summary: Shares of  Travelers  advanced on Friday after the property and casualty insurer’s second-quarter earnings blew away the consensus view despite Wall Street pessimism ahead of the report.  The company posted quarterly adjusted earnings of $10.04 a share, up from $6.51 a year ago and well above Wall Street’s expectation of $5.41.  The company said that core earnings increased on lower catastrophe losses and higher net investment income.

headline: Travelers (NYSE:TRV) Reports Q2 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
summary: Property and casualty insurer Travelers (NYSE:TRV) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales flat year on year at $12.15 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $10.04 per share was 86.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Why the Dow Is Flat After Opening Down 500 Points
